raw_consumer_statement:
I made a purchase using Barclay 's XXXX for {$54.00} that turned out to be to a scammer, " XXXX. '' The charge dates from XXXX. I have received NOTHING. 

The " vendor '' doesn't respond to messages. 

I got a spoof XXXX email with an invoice detailing the " order. '' Delivery tracking on the message doesn't work. 

The charge did not go through XXXX at all. It was a spoof XXXX. Barclays doesn't care. 

There is no charge at my XXXX for XXXX. 


So, anyway I told Barclay 's all of this. They halted the charge temporarily, saying they're " investigating. '' They followed up with a message saying they're ruling in favor of the scammer and I will be responsible for the charge. 

I tried again, sending Barclays a letter in the mail with proof and more details. 

They sent me a second letter saying they're ruling in favor of the scammer, and let me know the charge is back. If I don't pay up they're sending a complaint about me to the credit reporting agencies. 

Still, nothing received. No response from XXXX. 

Barclays warns me if I don't pay my credit will be dinged. 

HELP!
